rules.rule_text:
rule gholee
{
	meta:
		author = "www.clearskysec.com"
		date = "2014/08"
		maltype = "Remote Access Trojan"
		filetype = "dll"
		reference = "http://www.clearskysec.com/gholee-a-protective-edge-themed-spear-phishing-campaign/"

	strings:
		$a = "sandbox_avg10_vc9_SP1_2011"
		$b = "gholee"

	condition:
		all of them
}
